Title: Treasurer Loads Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a logged-in treasurer can open the Treasurer dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as an approved, active Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Treasurer.
2. Navigate to the Treasurer Dashboard.
Expected Results: The treasurer dashboard loads with the financial summary (income, expenses, balance) and current school year/semester.
Actual Results: The treasurer dashboard loads with the financial summary (income, expenses, balance) and current school year/semester.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the treasurer dashboard renders for a Treasurer. Fail if the dashboard does not load for a Treasurer.

Title: Unauthenticated Blocked from Treasurer Dashboard
Objectives: Verify an unauthenticated user cannot view the Treasurer dashboard.
Prerequisites: No active session (logged out).
Test Steps: 1. Without logging in, browse to the Treasurer Dashboard URL.
Expected Results: Redirected to the Login page.
Actual Results: Redirected to the Login page.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected to Login. Fail if an unauthenticated user can view the Treasurer dashboard.

Title: Non-Treasurer Blocked from Treasurer Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a non-treasurer role cannot view the Treasurer dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student, Professor, or Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a non-treasurer.
2. Browse to the Treasurer Dashboard URL.
Expected Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Actual Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected away to the user's own dashboard. Fail if a non-treasurer can view the Treasurer dashboard.

Title: Dashboard Financial Summary
Objectives: Verify the dashboard totals are correct.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; payments, funds, and expenses exist.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Treasurer Dashboard.
2. Review the summary cards.
Expected Results: Total income = org-fee payments + other funds; balance = total income - expenses; expense count and largest expense are shown.
Actual Results: Total income = org-fee payments + other funds; balance = total income - expenses; expense count and largest expense are shown.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the totals match the underlying records. Fail if any total does not match the records.

Title: Record Full Org-Fee Payment
Objectives: Verify a treasurer can record a full payment for a student.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student owes the selected fee.
Test Steps:
1. Open Collect / Record Payment.
2. Search and select the student.
3. Enter the full fee amount.
4. Submit.
Expected Results: Success: "Payment recorded successfully."; the payment is saved with status Paid.
Actual Results: Success: "Payment recorded successfully."; the payment is saved with status Paid.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment is recorded as Paid. Fail if the full payment is not recorded or not marked Paid.

Title: Record Partial Payment
Objectives: Verify a partial payment is saved with Partial status.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student owes the fee.
Test Steps:
1. Select the student.
2. Enter an amount less than the fee.
3. Submit.
Expected Results: Success: "Payment recorded successfully."; the payment is saved with status Partial.
Actual Results: Success: "Payment recorded successfully."; the payment is saved with status Partial.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment is recorded as Partial. Fail if the partial payment is not recorded or not marked Partial.

Title: Partial Payments Accumulate to Paid
Objectives: Verify multiple partial payments add up and flip the fee to Paid.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student already has a partial payment.
Test Steps:
1. Select the student with an existing partial.
2. Enter the remaining balance.
3. Submit.
Expected Results: The new payment plus previous partials reaches the fee total, so the record becomes Paid.
Actual Results: The new payment plus previous partials reaches the fee total, so the record becomes Paid.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the cumulative total marks the fee as Paid. Fail if the fee does not flip to Paid once fully covered.

Title: Invalid Semester Rejected
Objectives: Verify an unrecognized semester value is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Submit a payment with an invalid semester value.
Expected Results: Error: "Invalid semester selected."
Actual Results: Error: "Invalid semester selected."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the invalid semester is rejected. Fail if an unrecognized semester is accepted.

Title: No Fee Set for Semester
Objectives: Verify a payment is blocked when no fee is configured for the term.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; no fee exists for the current year/semester.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to record a payment for a term with no fee set.
Test Data: Current year, semester with no fee
Expected Results: Error: "No fee set for [semester] Semester of [school year]. Please set the fee in Settings first."
Actual Results: Error: "No fee set for [semester] Semester of [school year]. Please set the fee in Settings first."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment is blocked with the no-fee message. Fail if a payment is recorded with no fee set for the term.

Title: Student Not Charged (Entered Later)
Objectives: Verify a student who entered after the fee's term is not charged.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student's entry term is after the fee term.
Test Steps: 1. Select such a student and attempt to record the payment.
Test Data: Student entered after the fee term
Expected Results: Error: "This student is not charged for this semester because they entered after it."
Actual Results: Error: "This student is not charged for this semester because they entered after it."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the non-applicable fee is rejected. Fail if a student is charged for a semester before they entered.

Title: Unpaid Prior-Year Balance Blocks Payment
Objectives: Verify a student must settle previous school-year balances first.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student has an unpaid applicable prior-year fee.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to pay the current-year fee while a prior-year fee is unpaid.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot pay for this school year. The student still has an unpaid balance for the [sem] Semester of [year]. Previous school year balances must be settled first."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot pay for this school year. The student still has an unpaid balance for the [sem] Semester of [year]. Previous school year balances must be settled first."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment is blocked until prior balances are settled. Fail if a current-year payment is allowed with an unpaid prior-year balance.

Title: Second Semester Blocked Until First Paid
Objectives: Verify the 2nd-semester fee can't be paid until the 1st is fully paid.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student's 1st-semester fee (same year) is not fully paid.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to pay the 2nd-semester fee.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot pay 2nd semester until the 1st semester is fully paid."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot pay 2nd semester until the 1st semester is fully paid."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if 2nd-semester payment is blocked. Fail if the 2nd semester can be paid before the 1st is fully paid.

Title: Already Fully Paid
Objectives: Verify a fee that is already fully paid cannot be paid again.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student already fully paid the fee.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to record another payment for the same fully-paid fee.
Expected Results: Error: "This student has already fully paid for the [semester] Semester."
Actual Results: Error: "This student has already fully paid for the [semester] Semester."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if a duplicate full payment is blocked. Fail if a fully paid fee can be paid again.

Title: Payment With Receipt Number
Objectives: Verify a receipt is created when a receipt number is provided.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Record a payment and provide a receipt number.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Success: "Payment recorded successfully."; a receipt is created and linked to the payment.
Actual Results: Success: "Payment recorded successfully."; a receipt is created and linked to the payment.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the receipt is created and linked. Fail if no receipt is created or it is not linked.

Title: Search Students for Payment
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can search students and see their fee status.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Open Collect / Record Payment.
2. Type a name or CTU ID in the search.
Expected Results: Matching active, approved students are listed with their Paid/Partial status for the selected fee.
Actual Results: Matching active, approved students are listed with their Paid/Partial status for the selected fee.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the search returns the right students with status. Fail if the search returns the wrong students or no status.

Title: View Payment History
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can view all org-fee payments.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Open the Org Fee payment history / transactions.
Expected Results: All payments are listed (student, course, amount, status, date, receipt), newest first.
Actual Results: All payments are listed (student, course, amount, status, date, receipt), newest first.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment history is displayed. Fail if the payment history is not displayed.

Title: Edit a Payment
Objectives: Verify a treasurer can edit a payment amount/receipt.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; a payment exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open a payment for editing.
2. Change the amount and/or receipt number.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Payment updated successfully."; the status recalculates (Paid if amount reaches the fee, else Partial).
Actual Results: Success: "Payment updated successfully."; the status recalculates (Paid if amount reaches the fee, else Partial).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment is updated and the status recalculated. Fail if the payment is not updated or the status is wrong.

Title: View Student Ledger
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can open a student's org-fee ledger.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open a student's org-fee details / ledger.
Expected Results: The student's applicable fees (required / paid / balance / status) and full transaction history are shown.
Actual Results: The student's applicable fees (required / paid / balance / status) and full transaction history are shown.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the ledger shows the student's fees and transactions. Fail if the ledger does not show the fees and transactions.

Title: View / Print Receipt
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can view a payment's receipt.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; a payment with a receipt exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open the receipt for a payment.
Expected Results: The full receipt is shown (number, date, amount, status, semester, school year, student, issuer, and signature).
Actual Results: The full receipt is shown (number, date, amount, status, semester, school year, student, issuer, and signature).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the receipt displays with the issuer's signature. Fail if the receipt or the issuer's signature does not display.

Title: Add Other Fund
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can record non-org-fee income.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Open Add Fund.
2. Enter source, description, category, amount, and date.
3. Submit.
Expected Results: Success: "Fund recorded successfully."; the fund is saved and mapped to the matching school year.
Actual Results: Success: "Fund recorded successfully."; the fund is saved and mapped to the matching school year.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fund is recorded. Fail if the fund is not recorded.

Title: Edit Other Fund
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can edit a recorded fund.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; a fund exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open a fund for editing.
2. Change a field.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Fund updated successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "Fund updated successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fund is updated. Fail if the fund is not updated.

Title: View Other Funds
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can view all recorded funds.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Open the Other Funds / Income list.
Expected Results: All funds are listed (source, description, category, amount, date, recorded by), newest first.
Actual Results: All funds are listed (source, description, category, amount, date, recorded by), newest first.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the funds list is displayed. Fail if the funds list is not displayed.

Title: Add Expense
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can record an expense.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the balance is sufficient.
Test Steps:
1. Open Add Expense.
2. Enter description, amount, and date.
3. Submit.
Expected Results: Success: "Expense recorded successfully."; the expense is saved and mapped to the matching school year.
Actual Results: Success: "Expense recorded successfully."; the expense is saved and mapped to the matching school year.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the expense is recorded. Fail if the expense is not recorded.

Title: Add Expense Amount Not Positive
Objectives: Verify a zero or negative expense amount is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an expense amount of 0 or less.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Error: "Expense amount must be greater than zero."
Actual Results: Error: "Expense amount must be greater than zero."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the non-positive amount is rejected. Fail if a zero or negative expense amount is accepted.

Title: Expense Exceeds Available Balance
Objectives: Verify an expense that would make the balance negative is blocked.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the expense exceeds the available balance on that date.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an expense larger than the available balance for the date.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Error: "Recording ₱[amount] on [date] would make the balance go negative. The available balance on or after that date is ₱[available]."
Actual Results: Error: "Recording ₱[amount] on [date] would make the balance go negative. The available balance on or after that date is ₱[available]."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the over-balance expense is blocked. Fail if an expense that makes the balance negative is recorded.

Title: Add Expense With Receipt Image
Objectives: Verify a valid receipt image can be attached to an expense.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Add an expense and attach a valid image.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Success: "Expense recorded successfully."; the image is saved and linked to the expense.
Actual Results: Success: "Expense recorded successfully."; the image is saved and linked to the expense.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the image is stored with the expense. Fail if the valid image is not stored with the expense.

Title: Expense Image Invalid Type
Objectives: Verify non-image receipt files are rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Add an expense and attach a non-image file.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Error: "Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP receipt images are allowed."
Actual Results: Error: "Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP receipt images are allowed."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the non-image file is rejected. Fail if a non-image receipt file is accepted.

Title: Expense Image Too Large
Objectives: Verify a receipt image larger than 5MB is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Add an expense and attach an image over 5MB.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Error: "Each receipt image must be 5MB or smaller."
Actual Results: Error: "Each receipt image must be 5MB or smaller."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the oversized image is rejected. Fail if a receipt image larger than 5MB is accepted.

Title: Edit Expense
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can edit an expense (re-checking the balance).
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; an expense exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open an expense for editing.
2. Change the amount or date.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Expense updated successfully."; the change is rejected if it would make the balance negative.
Actual Results: Success: "Expense updated successfully."; the change is rejected if it would make the balance negative.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the expense is updated within the balance constraint. Fail if the expense is not updated or a balance-violating edit is accepted.

Title: View Expenses
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can view all recorded expenses.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Open the Expenses list.
Expected Results: All expenses are listed (description, amount, date, recorded by, images), newest first.
Actual Results: All expenses are listed (description, amount, date, recorded by, images), newest first.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the expenses list is displayed. Fail if the expenses list is not displayed.

Title: Save Treasurer Signature
Objectives: Verify a treasurer can save their signature.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Open Settings / Signature.
2. Draw or upload a signature.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Signature saved successfully."; the signature becomes the active one.
Actual Results: Success: "Signature saved successfully."; the signature becomes the active one.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the signature is saved as active. Fail if the signature is not saved or not active.

Title: Save Signature Invalid Format
Objectives: Verify a non-PNG signature payload is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Submit signature data that is not a PNG data URL.
2. Save.
Test Data: Signature: not a PNG data URL
Expected Results: Error: "Invalid signature image format."
Actual Results: Error: "Invalid signature image format."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the invalid signature is rejected. Fail if a non-PNG signature payload is accepted.

Title: Save Empty Signature
Objectives: Verify an empty signature is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Submit with no signature data.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Signature data is required."
Actual Results: Error: "Signature data is required."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the empty signature is rejected. Fail if an empty signature is accepted.

Title: New Signature Replaces Previous
Objectives: Verify saving a new signature deactivates the old one.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; a signature already exists.
Test Steps:
1. Save a new signature.
2. Check the active signature.
Expected Results: Only the newest signature is active; the previous one is marked inactive.
Actual Results: Only the newest signature is active; the previous one is marked inactive.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if only one signature is active after saving. Fail if more than one signature remains active.

Title: View My Signature
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can retrieve their active signature.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Open Settings / Signature.
Expected Results: The current active signature (if any) is shown; if none exists, the panel indicates no signature is saved.
Actual Results: The current active signature (if any) is shown; if none exists, the panel indicates no signature is saved.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the active signature is retrieved correctly. Fail if the wrong signature or none is retrieved.

Title: Update Own Avatar
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can change their own profile photo.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Open the profile.
2. Upload a valid image (JPG/PNG/WEBP, <= 2MB).
Expected Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile.
Actual Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the avatar updates. Fail if a valid image does not update the avatar.

Title: Set Fee Amount (Valid)
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can set the org fee for a school year and semester.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the school year exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open Settings -> Fees.
2. Choose the year and semester, enter an amount.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Fee amount set successfully."; this fee becomes the Current one (others Ended).
Actual Results: Success: "Fee amount set successfully."; this fee becomes the Current one (others Ended).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fee is saved as Current. Fail if the fee is not saved or not marked Current.

Title: Set Fee Amount (Zero or Negative)
Objectives: Verify a non-positive fee amount is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a fee amount of 0 or less.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Amount must be greater than zero."
Actual Results: Error: "Amount must be greater than zero."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if rejected. Fail if a zero or negative fee amount is accepted.

Title: Edit Fee Amount
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can edit an existing fee amount.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; a fee exists.
Test Steps:
1. Edit the fee amount.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Fee amount updated successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "Fee amount updated successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fee amount is updated. Fail if the fee amount is not updated.

Title: Set Fee Status to Current
Objectives: Verify marking a fee as Current demotes all other fees.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; multiple fees exist.
Test Steps: 1. Mark a fee as Current.
Expected Results: Success: "Status changed to Current."; all other fees become Ended.
Actual Results: Success: "Status changed to Current."; all other fees become Ended.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if only the chosen fee is Current. Fail if any other fee remains Current.

Title: Delete Fee (Valid)
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can delete a fee with no payments.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the fee has no payments.
Test Steps: 1. Delete the fee.
Expected Results: Success: "Fee record deleted successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "Fee record deleted successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the fee is deleted. Fail if the fee is not deleted.

Title: Delete Fee (Blocked by Payments)
Objectives: Verify deletion is blocked when payments exist for the fee.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the fee has payments.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to delete the fee.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this semester has existing payment records."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this semester has existing payment records."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if deletion is blocked. Fail if a fee with payments is deleted.

Title: Add School Year (Valid)
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can add a new school year (enrolled students advance one level).
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Open Settings -> School Years.
2. Enter a new year (end = start + 1) with semester dates.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "School year added successfully."; the new year becomes Current; enrolled students advance one year level (capped at 5).
Actual Results: Success: "School year added successfully."; the new year becomes Current; enrolled students advance one year level (capped at 5).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the year is added and the promotion occurs. Fail if the year is not added or enrolled students do not advance.

Title: Add School Year (Invalid Year Range)
Objectives: Verify year end must be exactly year start + 1.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a year where end is not start + 1.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Year end must be exactly year start + 1."
Actual Results: Error: "Year end must be exactly year start + 1."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if rejected. Fail if a year whose end is not exactly start + 1 is accepted.

Title: Add School Year (Duplicate)
Objectives: Verify a duplicate school year is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; 2026-2027 already exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an existing school year.
2. Save.
Expected Results: Error: "This school year already exists."
Actual Results: Error: "This school year already exists."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate is rejected. Fail if a duplicate school year is accepted.

Title: Delete School Year (Valid)
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can delete a school year with no records.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the school year has no payments, funds, or expenses.
Test Steps: 1. Delete the school year and confirm.
Expected Results: Success: "School year deleted successfully."
Actual Results: Success: "School year deleted successfully."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the year is deleted. Fail if the year is not deleted.

Title: Delete School Year (Blocked by Payments)
Objectives: Verify deletion is blocked when payment records exist.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the school year has payment records.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to delete the school year.
Expected Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this school year has existing payment records. Delete the payments first."
Actual Results: Error: "Cannot delete — this school year has existing payment records. Delete the payments first."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if deletion is blocked. Fail if a school year with payment records is deleted.

Title: Set School Year as Current
Objectives: Verify marking a school year Current ends the others.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; multiple school years exist.
Test Steps: 1. Set a school year's status to Current.
Expected Results: Success: "School year set as Current."; all other years become Ended.
Actual Results: Success: "School year set as Current."; all other years become Ended.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if only the chosen year is Current. Fail if any other school year remains Current.

Objectives: Verify the treasurer can update a school year's semester dates.

Actual Results: Error: "Invalid semester."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the invalid semester is rejected. Fail if an invalid semester is accepted.

Actual Results: The student's exemptions are listed (school year and semester).

Objectives: Verify the treasurer can remove an exemption.

Expected Results: Success: "Exemption removed."
Actual Results: Success: "Exemption removed."

Title: Set Student Payment Start
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can set when a student starts owing fees.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the student and school year exist.
Test Steps:
1. Open the student's record.
2. Set the payment-start year and semester.
3. Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Payment start updated."; the student's entry year and semester are set.
Actual Results: Success: "Payment start updated."; the student's entry year and semester are set.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment start is updated. Fail if the payment start is not updated.

Title: Search All Students With Payment Status
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can search students and see their overall payment status.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps:
1. Open the students payment overview.
2. Type a name or CTU ID in the search.
Expected Results: Matching students are returned with their payment status.
Actual Results: Matching students are returned with their payment status.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the search returns students with status. Fail if the search returns the wrong students or no status.

Title: View All Treasurer Signatures
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can view all saved treasurer signatures.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Open the signatures list.
Expected Results: All treasurer signatures are listed (treasurer name, created date, active flag), newest first.
Actual Results: All treasurer signatures are listed (treasurer name, created date, active flag), newest first.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the signatures are listed. Fail if the signatures are not listed.

Title: Create Financial Report
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can create a financial report from selected funds and expenses.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; funds and/or expenses exist.
Test Steps:
1. Open Reports.
2. Choose report type, title, school year, semester, and date range.
3. Select the funds/expenses to include.
4. Create the report.
Expected Results: Report is created with status Final; beginning balance, total revenue, total expenses, and running balance are computed and saved with the selected items.
Actual Results: Report is created with status Final; beginning balance, total revenue, total expenses, and running balance are computed and saved with the selected items.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the report is created with correct totals. Fail if the report is not created or the totals are wrong.

Title: View Reports List
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can view the list of reports.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Open the Reports page.
Expected Results: All reports are listed (type, title, status, balances, school year, created by), newest first.
Actual Results: All reports are listed (type, title, status, balances, school year, created by), newest first.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the reports list is displayed. Fail if the reports list is not displayed.

Title: View Report Detail
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can open a report and see its line items.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; a report exists.
Test Steps: 1. Open a report from the list.
Expected Results: The report detail is shown with its totals and the list of included items (funds and expenses).
Actual Results: The report detail is shown with its totals and the list of included items (funds and expenses).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the report detail and items are shown. Fail if the report detail or its items are not shown.

Title: View Report Detail (Not Found)
Objectives: Verify a missing report returns a not-found message.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Request a report id that does not exist.
Expected Results: Error: "Report not found."
Actual Results: Error: "Report not found."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if a missing report is handled gracefully. Fail if a missing report id does not return the not-found message.

Title: Logout
Objectives: Verify the treasurer can sign out.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer.
Test Steps: 1. Click Sign Out.
Expected Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; treasurer pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Actual Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; treasurer pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the session ends and the user is logged out. Fail if the session persists or treasurer pages stay accessible.

Title: Payment With Already-Used Receipt Number
Objectives: Verify recording a payment with a receipt number that is already in use is rejected and that no payment is created.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; the entered receipt number already belongs to an existing payment.
Test Steps:
1. Open Collect / Record Payment.
2. Search and select a student who owes the fee.
3. Enter the fee amount and a receipt number that is already used.
4. Submit.
Expected Results: Error: "Receipt number [number] has already been used. Please enter a different one."; no payment is recorded.
Actual Results: Error: "Receipt number [number] has already been used. Please enter a different one."; no payment is recorded.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate receipt number is rejected and no payment is created. Fail if a payment is created, or a payment is saved without a receipt number.

Title: Edit Payment to an Already-Used Receipt Number
Objectives: Verify editing a payment to a receipt number that belongs to a different payment is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Treasurer; a payment exists and a different payment already uses the target receipt number.
Test Steps:
1. Open an existing payment for editing.
2. Change its receipt number to one already used by a different payment.
3. Save.
Test Data: PaymentId; Receipt number = (used by another payment)
Expected Results: Error: "Receipt number [number] has already been used. Please enter a different one."; the payment is left unchanged.
Actual Results: Error: "Receipt number [number] has already been used. Please enter a different one."; the payment is left unchanged.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate receipt number is rejected and the payment is unchanged. Fail if the edit is accepted or the payment is saved with a duplicate receipt number.
